title: You're Not Thinking Straight
overview: Strewn on the blood, alcohol and urine soaked tiles of a dingy public bathroom, a young man reflects on the sex worker who stole his heart in a series of surreal and nightmarish flashbacks. ‘You’re Not Thinking Straight’ is a fiercely unique coming-of-age tale about what it means to be young, lonely and clamouring for love in a broken world.
